channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping on Rushmore Road, 13th April
item.description:
Flytipping on Rushmore Road consisting of construction waste, wooden pallets, garden table, shelving/storage units, and increasingly general rubbish (dog waste bags, beer bottles etc). Present for about a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powerscroft Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blockwd gulley, reported numerous occasions in recent months. Still not resolved, 13th April
item.description:
Approaching over 6 konths of ongoing reporting of a blocked gulley. 2 noticeable site visits have occurred, but still receive 'fully resolved' emails after reporting the issues time and time again. The issue has historically been present over many years, but normally gets cleared in good time albeit not permanent

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edison Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bulky combustible furniture dumped in bin areas adjacent to flats, 13th April
item.description:
LFB noticed while driving past. Bulky combustible furniture dumped in bin areas adjacent to flats. Items dumped at either end of the block.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The landscape areas of Kelly Avenue and Watts Street haven't been taking care of for more than 2 months, 13th April
item.description:
Please urgently arrange for all the landscape areas of Kelly Avenue and Watts Street to be taken care of as it wasn't done for months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelly Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Refuse bins at 329 Milkwood Road missed today, 13th April
item.description:
My rubbish was not collected today and my bin is full. Please collect it ASAP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milkwood Road, Herne Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping behind 62 - 72 Courtlands Avenue, 13th April
item.description:
Large amount of building waste and rubbish blocking access to multiple back gardens

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Courtlands Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter picking wasn't done for more than 1 week, 13th April
item.description:
Same problems again and again Kelly Avenue and Watts Street full of litter Cleaning service teams are not Cleaning our streets Absolutely unprofessional and unacceptable Please urgently remove this litter from our streets and pavements
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29; 31, Kelly Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A plastic bag in a tree, 13th April
item.description:
Raising it again here as you closed the other one this morning for some reason.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 136-148, Tooley Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sign twisted round, 13th April
item.description:
Road sign twisted on lampost

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palmer Place, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on parking sign, 13th April
item.description:
Graffiti on parking sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Greenland Quay, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bag dumped outside the church, 13th April
item.description:
Bag will be torn open by the foxes if there is any food in there... Is this from the Church from Sunday? Can this be investigated - as to who is dumping (is this by the Church goers?)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensgate Mews, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Protective fencing removed, 13th April
item.description:
The little walk way into the lake that some idiot set alight, which had protective fencing securely placed to stop people from entering the damaged pier has been removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Brides Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and bbq left, 13th April
item.description:
Reoccurring. BBQ and rubbish left everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Brides Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes and backs of rubbish, 13th April
item.description:
Boxes and bags of rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste and shopping trolley fly tipping, 13th April
item.description:
This mess has been here for several days. Could be flammable and a fire hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windsor Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofa, 13th April
item.description:
Large sofa flytipped blocking pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sigdon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture being dumped infront of the building blocking pathway, 13th April
item.description:
There are so many home furnitures dumped infront of the building blocking the access to the building. It’s been there for over 2 weeks now and big mess

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-39, Chilton Grove, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike frame causing obstruction to pavement, 13th April
item.description:
See above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wharf Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th April
item.description:
Waste fly tipped into area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spearman Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish not collected, 13th April
item.description:
Not collected

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
